artificial intelligence: AI is the simulation of human intelligence by computer systems. Includes machine learning, deep learning, natural language processing, and computer vision.
python: Python is a high-level, interpreted programming language created by Guido van Rossum in 1991. Known for readability and extensive standard library.
machine learning: ML is a subset of AI where systems learn from data without explicit programming. Types: supervised, unsupervised, reinforcement learning.
neural network: Computing systems inspired by biological neural networks. Consist of layers of interconnected nodes (neurons) with weighted connections.
blockchain: A decentralized, distributed digital ledger that records transactions across many computers. Underpins cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin.
quantum computing: Computing using quantum-mechanical phenomena like superposition and entanglement. Uses qubits instead of classical bits.
iron man suit: The Iron Man suit is powered by an Arc Reactor. Features repulsor beams, flight thrusters, AI assistance (me), and weapon systems. First built Mark I in a cave.
